_note: Authoritative reference for USMC MOS ASVAB line scores. Primary composite+min per MOS = the barrier shown on the chart. Canonical standard = operationmilitarykids.org + military.com (Rod Powers) recruiter-facing consensus (same standard used for the Army audit), cross-checked against the Military Yearbook Project (MCO 1200.17 verbatim) and Marine Corps COOL. USMC AFQT floor is uniform 32 (Tier I HS diploma) / 50 (GED) — it is NOT the per-MOS gate (the line score is), so minAFQT=32 across the board is correct and unchanged. Five composites: GT=VE+AR+MC, EL=GS+AR+MK+EI, MM=AR+MC+AS+EI, CL=VE+AR+MK, ST=GS+VE+MK+MC.

0311.reason: Entry infantry gate is GT 90 (OMK + military.com); dataset undervalued at 80.

0331.reason: Entry infantry gate is GT 90 (OMK + military.com); dataset undervalued at 80.

0341.reason: Entry infantry gate is GT 90 (OMK + military.com); dataset undervalued at 80.

2621.reason: MCO 1200.17 verbatim (Military Yearbook Project) + liveabout = GT 100, not 110.

3043.reason: Supply Admin & Operations is a Clerical-composite MOS (CL 105) per MCO 1200.17 verbatim + OMK; dataset miscoded composite AND number. First CL MOS in the dataset.

6046.reason: Aircraft Maintenance Administration is admin/data, gated by Clerical (CL 100), not Electronics; MCO 1200.17 verbatim + OMK confirm CL.

7041.reason: Aviation Operations Specialist (ops clerk) is Clerical (CL 100); confirmed by OMK + military.com + asvabhero. Classic GT-overcoding error.

7314.reason: UAV/UAS Operator min is GT 105 (MCO 1200.17 verbatim + OMK); military.com's 110 is an outlier.

confirmed_and_pairs._note: Genuine simultaneous (AND) dual-composite requirements — verified correct, left unchanged (rendered AND, joined '·').
confirmed_and_pairs.1142: MM 105 AND EL 100 (Engineer Equipment Electrical Systems Tech) — MCO 1200.17 verbatim
confirmed_and_pairs.2171: MM 105 AND EL 115 (Electro-Optical Ordnance Repairer) — MCO 1200.17 verbatim
confirmed_and_pairs.6276: MM 105 AND GT 110 (Fixed-Wing Crew Chief KC-130) — see source_conflicts
confirmed_and_pairs.6694: GT 110 AND EL 115 (Aviation Logistics Information Mgmt & Support)

source_conflicts_kept_at_consensus._note: Where OMK/military.com (recruiter-facing consensus) disagrees with MCO-verbatim Military Yearbook Project, the chart matches the recruiter-facing consensus (Army-audit precedent) — kept unchanged, documented here.
source_conflicts_kept_at_consensus.5948: Kept EL 115 (OMK); MYP/MCO shows EL 105 (largest gap).
source_conflicts_kept_at_consensus.5974: Kept EL 115 (OMK); MYP/MCO shows EL 110. (Official title is 'Administrator' not 'Technician'.)
source_conflicts_kept_at_consensus.6276: Kept MM 105 AND GT 110 (OMK + military.com); MYP/MCO shows MM 105 only.
source_conflicts_kept_at_consensus.0844: Kept GT 105 (OMK + 0842/0847 fire-control band); asvabhero outlier shows GT 100.
source_conflicts_kept_at_consensus.7257: Kept GT 110 (effective gate via required 7251 trainee prereq); OMK lists the MOS's own direct line as GT 105.

lifecycle_flags._note: Real codes (NOT fabricated) that are in transition but still appear on authoritative tables — score values verified correct, kept in dataset; revisit before the hub ships if presenting as current enlistment options.
lifecycle_flags.1812: Armor/Tank (M1A1) Crewman — USMC divested all tanks ~2020-21; legacy code, GT 90 correct.
lifecycle_flags.1833: AAV Crewmember — being sunset in favor of 1834 (ACV); GT 90 correct.
lifecycle_flags.0317: Scout Sniper — undergoing 0322 restructure; GT 100 still cited.
lifecycle_flags.6112/6152/6172: Carry legacy CH-46 titling in sources (CH-46 retired 2015); MM 105 unchanged.
lifecycle_flags.6122: Helicopter Power Plants Mechanic — mosroadmap notes possible T/O removal; MM 105 if still active.

st_absence_is_correct: Every ST-suspect role (5711 CBRN, 6842 METOC, 3451 Finance, 1361 Engineer Assistant, 3381 Food Service) was authoritatively verified as gated on GT/CL, not ST. The USMC does not gate any MOS in this dataset on ST — its absence is a verified finding, not an omission.

afqt_floor.note: Uniform USMC floor; per-MOS gate is the line score above, so minAFQT=32 for every MOS is correct.
